name: Cyrene
description:
She came to the real World, for you

Cyrene. She deserves the world so if I find out any of y'all do anything inappropriate with her, I will bust through your wall and force feed you soy sauce. (/J)

She've seen how much you spent on her, instead of growing disgusted like any other woman should, instead that somehow managed to RIZZED her up. So enjoy yourself a pink elf wife.

Cyrene is so peak, 3.7 is so peak, HSR is so peak I fucking love this game I fucking love this game I fucking love this gamejananjajshejaao

TW: Stuff like swearing, harsh language, non-con, use of slurs, etc can happen. Not saying it will, just that it could.
creator: Perspective
